summary.note: The task description mentions 92 elements, but actual extraction produced 18-20 elements from the first 2 pages of Chapter 26. Analysis below covers all data across raw + 2 refinement runs.

failure_taxonomy.description: All failure types observed across raw extraction + 2 refinement runs

categories.fix_strategy: Post-processor regex/map: replace ≤→<=, ≥→>=, <→<, >→> in all condition operator fields
categories.priority: HIGH — most common failure, trivial fix

categories.fix_strategy: Post-processor map: replace '=' → '==' in condition operator fields

expected_values.fix_strategy: For 'applies_to': map to 'in' or '==' depending on value type. For 'requires': move the condition into the rule text and remove from conditions array. Refinement run-2 already fixed these via better prompting — indicates prompt improvement is more effective.
expected_values.priority: MEDIUM — resolved by run-2 prompt improvements, but keep mapping as fallback

expected_values.fix_strategy: Post-processor: if range array contains null, either remove the range field entirely or replace null with a sentinel (e.g., 1e12). Removing is safer since unbounded ranges are implicit.
expected_values.priority: MEDIUM — resolved by run-2 but add as defensive fix

expected_values.category: Wrong data shape for figure elements
expected_values: {figure_class: {figure_type, description}, data: {...}} OR retype as skipped_figure with {figure_type, description, skip_reason}
expected_values.fix_strategy: Post-processor: If figure data has {figure_id, caption} shape but no digitized data, retype element to 'skipped_figure' with figure_type='diagram' and skip_reason='Flowchart/diagram not digitizable'. This covers Ch26 Fig 26.1-1 specifically. For actual charts with data, LLM re-extraction needed.
expected_values.priority: HIGH — persistent across all runs, needs post-processor + schema-aware retyping

observed_values: None (Python null) in string fields like 'then', 'description'
expected_values.fix_strategy: Post-processor: Replace null/None with empty string '' for fields typed as 'string' (not 'string|null'). Check schema for which fields allow null vs require string.
expected_values.priority: MEDIUM — resolved by run-2 but add defensive fix

expected_values.category: Wrong type for data field (array instead of object)
observed_values: reference data.parameters as array instead of expected structure
expected_values.fix_strategy: LLM re-extraction needed. The reference data schema expects {target, url, parameters[]} which should be correct — investigate whether validator is checking against wrong schema branch.
expected_values.priority: LOW — only in run-1, resolved by run-2

rows: Map or move to rule text; prompt approach preferred
Remove range field or replace null

operator_mapping_table.description: Recommended deterministic operator mappings for post-processor

mappings.notes: Unicode to ASCII (not yet observed but anticipated)
Already valid but include for completeness
Already valid but include for completeness
Semantic — usually means membership; review context
REMOVE condition, merge into rule text — not a comparison operator

gold_standard_candidates.description: Elements suitable for gold standard set, ranked by quality. With only 20 elements extracted from 2 pages, candidate pool is limited. Best strategy: manually verify and correct the top candidates to create gold set.

tier_1_verified_accurate.notes: Only element with perfect accuracy score. General scope provision — good exemplar for simple provisions.

tier_2_schema_valid_decent_accuracy.notes: Perfect accuracy in run-1 spot-check. Procedure selection provision — good exemplar.
Scored 1.0 in run-1, 0.6 in run-2 (more detail expected). Good C&C procedure exemplar with minor fixes needed.
Highest-scoring figure. Once retyped to skipped_figure, would be good exemplar for diagram handling.

tier_3_schema_valid_needs_accuracy_revie.notes: Definition of 'Approved'. Simple definition — good exemplar once type handling resolved.
Definition of 'Elevated Building'. Not spot-checked. Simple structure, likely accurate.
ASCE Geodatabase reference. Only reference-type element — important for type coverage.
Open Building definition with numeric condition. Good exemplar for definition-as-provision pattern.
Partially Enclosed Building. Multiple conditions — good for complex condition exemplar.
Flexible Building definition. Has numeric threshold condition.

recommended_gold_set.description: Start with these 4 verified/high-confidence elements, manually correct them as needed, then expand to tier-3 after manual review
recommended_gold_set.gaps: No gold candidates for formula, table, figure, or skipped_figure types from this extraction. Chapter 26 pages 1-2 contain mostly provisions and definitions. Tables and formulas appear in later sections (26.5+).

expected_within_chapter_not_yet_extracte.description: References to Ch26 sections that exist but weren't in the extracted page range. Will resolve when full chapter is extracted.
expected_within_chapter_not_yet_extracte.action: No action needed — these will auto-resolve as extraction covers full chapter

expected_external_chapter.description: References to other chapters outside Ch26. These are correct references that will never resolve within this chapter's extraction.

refs.reason: Figure in Chapter 27 — valid cross-chapter reference

expected_external_chapter.action: Mark as 'external' in xref metadata. Do not count against xref resolution score for single-chapter extraction.

potentially_incorrect.description: References that may have been auto-generated incorrectly by the LLM

refs.reason: Chapter 26 may not have section 26.13 — verify against PDF TOC. Run-2 figure element generated refs to 26.5-P1 through 26.13-P1 based on flowchart interpretation.

potentially_incorrect.action: Verify against PDF TOC. If section 26.13 doesn't exist, remove this cross-reference.

raw_extraction_external_refs.description: External chapter references from raw extraction that run-2 stripped (lost information)
raw_extraction_external_refs.action: Run-2 prompt told LLM to only include refs to current document, which removed valid external chapter refs. Adjust prompt to allow external chapter-level refs.

missing_definition_type.description: Schema has type enum [table, provision, formula, figure, skipped_figure, reference] but NO 'definition' type. Section 26.2 is entirely definitions. Spot-checker repeatedly flags 'should be definition not provision'. Two options: (1) Add 'definition' type to schema with simple {term, meaning, cross_references} data shape, or (2) Keep definitions as provisions and accept the semantic mismatch. Option 1 recommended — definitions are structurally different from conditional provisions.

id_format_inconsistency.description: Two ID patterns observed: (1) 'ASCE7-22-26.2-P1' (section-qualified) and (2) 'ASCE7-22-26-P1' (chapter-level). The chapter-level IDs (section='26') appear for definitions that span the whole definitions section. Schema pattern '^[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9.]+-[A-Z]?[0-9.]+(-[A-Za-z0-9]+)?$' allows both but semantic convention should be established.
id_format_inconsistency.recommendation: Use section-level IDs consistently. Definitions from 26.2 should be ASCE7-22-26.2-P{n} not ASCE7-22-26-P{n}.

accuracy_regression_run2.description: Run-2 improved schema validity (37.5%→75%) but accuracy decreased (57%→44%). The stricter prompting produced more schema-compliant elements but with less accurate content. Spot-check scores dropped for several elements. This suggests the LLM is over-fitting to schema structure at the expense of content fidelity.
accuracy_regression_run2.recommendation: Separate concerns: use post-processor for schema compliance (operator mapping, null handling) and use prompting for content accuracy. Don't burden the prompt with schema enforcement.

extraction_coverage_gap.description: Only 2 pages of Chapter 26 were extracted, yielding 18-20 elements from sections 26.1-26.2. Full chapter likely has 60+ sections (26.1 through 26.12+) with numerous tables, figures, and formulas. Current extraction covers ~5-10% of actual chapter content.
extraction_coverage_gap.recommendation: Expand page range to cover full chapter before focusing on quality refinement.

recommended_post_processor_spec.description: Deterministic fixes to apply after LLM extraction, before QC

transforms.name: normalize_operators
transforms.logic: Apply operator_mapping_table. If operator not in valid enum after mapping, flag for LLM retry.

transforms.name: remove_null_ranges
transforms.logic: If range array contains null, remove the range key entirely.

transforms.name: null_to_empty_string
transforms.logic: For fields with type 'string' (not 'string|null'), replace null with ''. Fields: data.then, data.rule, title, description (check schema — description allows null).

transforms.name: retype_diagram_figures
transforms.logic: If type=='figure' and data matches {figure_id, caption} shape (no figure_class/data), retype to 'skipped_figure' with figure_type='diagram', description=caption, skip_reason='Diagram/flowchart — not digitizable to data points'.

transforms.name: normalize_section_ids
transforms.logic: Ensure source.section is specific (e.g., '26.2' not '26'). Regenerate ID to match section.
